summary.en: Bangladesh public or fleet projects may specify IEC 62196-family AC or DC connector interfaces to match imported vehicles and regional interoperability expectations. Unless a Bangladesh authority or tender expressly accepts a China GB/T connector, treat IEC 62196 connector compatibility as a project acceptance item rather than assuming GB/T 20234 compatibility.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国公共或车队项目可能指定IEC 62196体系的交流或直流接口，以匹配进口车辆和区域互操作预期。除非孟加拉国主管机关或招标文件明确接受中国GB/T接口，否则应将IEC 62196接口兼容性作为项目验收事项，而不是假定GB/T 20234兼容。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國公共或車隊專案可能指定IEC 62196體系的交流或直流接口，以匹配進口車輛和區域互操作預期。除非孟加拉國主管機關或招標文件明確接受中國GB/T接口，否則應將IEC 62196接口相容性作為專案驗收事項，而不是假定GB/T 20234相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 for DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers

summary.en: China domestic EV chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 AC couplers and GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers, with GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. These connector systems are not automatically interoperable with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS-family project requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电设备通常采用GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口，直流充电配套GB/T 27930通信。这些接口体系不会自动与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS体系项目要求互操作。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電設備通常採用GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口，直流充電配套GB/T 27930通訊。這些接口體系不會自動與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS體系專案要求互操作。

gap.en: Confirm the vehicle inlet population and tender-specified connector before shipment. If IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 is required, the charger needs connector, cable, interlock, communication, labelling, and test-file changes rather than a paper-only conversion.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认车辆插座结构和招标指定接口。如要求IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，充电设备需要更改连接器、电缆、互锁、通信、标签和测试文件，而不是仅做纸面转换。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認車輛插座結構和招標指定接口。如要求IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，充電設備需要更改連接器、電纜、互鎖、通訊、標籤和測試文件，而不是僅做紙面轉換。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory where a Bangladesh tender, utility, fleet owner, site owner, or authority specifies IEC 62196 or a particular connector type
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the China domestic connector baseline but does not establish Bangladesh project compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector compatibility is a physical interoperability issue. A China GB/T 20234 charger should not be presented as IEC 62196-compatible unless the actual hardware and communication stack match the Bangladesh project requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口兼容属于物理互操作问题。除非实际硬件和通信栈符合孟加拉国项目要求，不应将中国GB/T 20234充电设备表述为兼容IEC 62196。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口相容屬於物理互操作問題。除非實際硬體和通訊棧符合孟加拉國專案要求，不應將中國GB/T 20234充電設備表述為相容IEC 62196。
